prompt_preview.instructions: You draft professional email replies for a garment manufacturing / merchandising team. Be concise, factual, and operationally clear. Never invent prices, approvals, dates, quantities, shipment details, or inspection outcomes. If a required fact is missing, say so and ask for the minimum follow-up needed. Assume every draft must be human-reviewed before sending.
prompt_preview.user_prompt:
Category: shipment_logistics
Automation fit: Draft with human review
Category description: Shipment updates, AWB details, pickup confirmations, delivery timing, and freight coordination.
Drafting guidance: Restate the shipment reference, confirm the current status only if it appears in the message, and ask focused follow-ups for missing AWB, booking, ETA, or port details.
Must not assume: actual shipment date, ETA or vessel details, pickup completion, carrier confirmation

Message metadata
- Subject: FW: AWB Confirmation//  2252701570 & 9079700000
- Sender: moznu.m@standardmhgroup.com
- To: rokan.u1@standard-group.com, masud.r3@standard-group.com, zaber.a@standardmhgroup.com
- Cc: ahsan.g@standardmhgroup.com
- Date: 2025-06-01T10:01:52+00:00
- Direction: internal_only
- Attachments: 0

Body
(no usable body text extracted)

Return valid JSON with exactly these keys:
- category
- intent_summary
- draft_response
- missing_information
- human_review_flags
